compute.specs: 4 vCPU AMD, 8 GB RAM, 160 GB NVMe, 20 TB egress EU

proxy.unit_price: $7/GB entry; scales to $1.75/GB at high committed volume

scheduler.recommended: Supabase pg_cron + Edge Function trigger (already in stack)

observability.recommended: Sentry (already used in project) + log aggregation

anti_bot.approach: Crawlee fingerprint-injector + got-scraping + Playwright stealth + IPRoyal residential rotation

operational_realities: Engineer-day cost ~R$ 800-1.200/day in BR (mid-senior) for setup + maintenance
Initial setup: ~3-5 dias (Docker compose, CI, secrets, alerting)
Monthly maintenance: ~4-8h (dep updates, proxy retune, blocked-site fixes)
DataDome / Cloudflare Bot Management bypass = harder — may need Camoufox (Firefox patched) for ImovelWeb
